newsSince: No new material company-specific news since June 9. Record Q1 (bookings +25% to $321M, EPS $2.84 beat), the 157M EUR voestalpine BOHLER Profil acquisition close (Apr 30) with raised revenue / trimmed EPS guidance, and the $50M buyback (May 21) all predate the window and were in the prior hold.

verdicts.rankRationale: Latent strict screen: fluid handling/filtration is a speculative water-reuse/thermal-process pathway, not a confirmed AI node. Record Q1, Profil close and buyback all predate Jun 9. No new releases/contracts/analyst moves in the window; +3.9% is noise. Strict capability claim unchanged.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Speculative redirect of process-fluid systems to data-center water reuse/thermal control
verdicts.primaryRisk: No direct AI revenue; pulp/paper/industrial cyclicality; Profil EPS dilution
verdicts.bull: Record bookings +25%, Profil acquisition expands industrial processing; optionality to data-center water/thermal.
verdicts.neutral: Quality industrial compounder but AI-node link is speculative on the strict screen; news predates window.
verdicts.bear: Core demand is pulp/paper/industrial; AI exposure is a thesis, not revenue; acquisition dilutes FY26 EPS ~$0.20.
